page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 4 dedicated physical CPU cores and 4 vCPUs, operating with a single thread per core. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance integrates a single NVIDIA P4 graphics processing unit equipped with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM. It does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through attached network block storage. Baseline network performance is rated at 2 Gbps, and the instance does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge offers entry-level GPU acceleration, making it a viable option for workloads requiring hardware-accelerated processing without the expense of high-end enterprise GPUs. This configuration is suitable for workloads such as low-concurrency deep learning inference, video transcoding, lightweight graphics rendering, and general-purpose compute tasks that benefit from GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine instance designed for entry-level parallel processing workloads. Built on the KVM hypervisor and x86_64 architecture, it features 4 dedicated physical CPU cores and 4 vCPUs, paired with 16.0 GB of system memory. The primary hardware differentiator is the inclusion of a single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of VRAM. This instance does not feature local storage, relying entirely on network-attached storage, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. It offers a cost-effective entry point for GPU computing, making it suitable for workloads such as small-scale deep learning inference, video encoding, and lightweight CUDA-based acceleration tasks where high-end GPU resources are not required.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn5i-c4g1.xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 4 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB VRAM for entry-level parallel computing.

tagline: A budget-friendly GPU instance featuring dedicated x86_64 cores and an NVIDIA P4 accelerator for entry-level parallel computing workloads.

Single NVIDIA P4 GPU with 8 GB of dedicated VRAM
